notes: The game worked out of the box on Proton. I did install additionally D9VK and it worked as well via DX9 to Vulkan translation.
title: A Story About My Uncle

notes: The game works flawlessly on Windows on my PC. Linux Native isn't up to par and requires better specs to get that same performance. It didnt run any better with proton UNTIL I enabled D9VK with "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%". Then it ran at a constant 60fps. It did crash but I suspect my PC being at fault there since it already has immense hardware issues. I would recommend anybody else playing this game natively to test it out in Proton using D9VK and see the difference and provide their feedback.
title: A Story About My Uncle
